raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a hotel through XXXX for my XXXX honeymoon using my CitiBank Visa. Because of a glitch on XXXX site, the reservation was made for 7 nights instead of the 3 nights we intended. 

I caught the error immediately and contacted XXXX within XXXX hours. They refused to help and told me to reach out to the hotel directly. When I called the hotel, they hung up on us three different times, acted like they couldnt hear us, and pretended not to speak XXXX and hung up even though it was obvious they understood. No one took responsibility. 

This reservation was made nearly a month before our actual trip, so XXXX had plenty of time to correct the mistake or rebook the room, but they simply wouldnt. 

After getting nowhere with XXXX or the hotel, I turned to CitiBank, expecting some level of protection. I explained that we never even checked into the hotel and that we were trying to fix the mistake right away. Despite this, Citi denied my dispute not once, but 3 times. I escalated it to Citis Executive Response Unit, and after all of that, they still refused to help. They didnt issue a refund, a partial credit, or even show any effort to resolve this. They completely dismissed it just because XXXX wouldnt refund them when in reality it was XXXX fault. 

We paid almost {$2000.00} for a hotel we never stayed at, during what was supposed to be one of the most important moments of our life.our honeymoon. I feel like we did everything right, but Citi failed us completely when we needed support the most.

Im requesting a full refund or, at the very least, a credit for the unused hotel stay.
